jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Full Vitest suite passed: 163 files / 640 tests
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next, vcontrolhub-ssh-ws, and caddy active; /api/status healthy; key auth-protected APIs returned 401 without 500; recent logs clean

lastRun.target: Fresh audit checkpoint after 7 successful remediation runs
lastRun.summary: Performed milestone fresh audit after the remediation counter exceeded the threshold; production is healthy, full quality gates passed, smoke passed, route probes had no 500s, and backlog/state were refreshed for the next remediation cycle.
validation: git status clean at audit start
key HTTPS API probes returned 200/401 without 500
lastRun.deployment: No code change in this checkpoint; production was already running the latest verified code and smoke passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: Continue with remaining P3/P4/P5/P6 availability backlog, starting with Quick Services install failure cleanup or two-factor settings reload removal.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
